_comment: Committed, human-maintained source of truth for the Team Tactics marketing claim (ADR-0012, AC-3). The product test asserts the projects.json copy/tags agree with THIS fixture; the live .claude/hooks/tics-mcp.cjs read is only a skip-if-absent tripwire on slow-moving facts. Changing the claimed tool set or the no-SDK promise must be a deliberate edit here.
